name: slim-margin
description: Run Claude on a slim token margin. Enforces budget discipline and smart model-tier routing (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) on long, complex, or codebase-heavy tasks. Orchestrates three hard-dependency skills: graphify (codebase knowledge graph), claude-mem (persistent session memory), and caveman (output compression). Fails closed if any dependency is missing — the skill's whole premise is not doing work those tools already do.
